subcodes.first_line: O my God! Every night do I burn with the fire of separation from Thee, and every day am I gladdened by the wondrous tokens of Thy grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فیا الهی فی کل اللیالی احترق بنار فراقک و فی کل الایام ابتهج ببدایع افضالک
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @love of God, @pain of love; love as veil, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
